decision: Brief delivery should be immediate — mid-session hook for incoming briefs

steps.action: Brief delivery should be immediate — mid-session hook for incoming briefs
steps.notes: Scan interval 120s→30s, brief content inlined (first 20 lines) on detection. Roles now get delivery, not just announcement. Limitation: still requires Jeff to type in the session to trigger the hook — true push requires architectural change (C#15).

Verified: scan interval 120s→30s, brief content inlined (first 20 lines with remainder count), capped at 10 briefs per scan, marker-based dedup. Sound implementation. Limitation acknowledged: still pull-based (UserPromptSubmit), true push blocked on C#15.
